tool_args.label: In-house MOW Track Construction capability
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT's rail well-being is attributed to having an in-house, on-site Maintenance of Way (MOW) Track Construction team that systematically replaces outdated track with new prefabricated 39-foot track panels

payload.claim_text: NYCT's in-house, on-site Maintenance of Way (MOW) Track Construction team systematically replaces outdated track with new prefabricated 39-foot track panels. Using track panels helps provide customers with faster, smoother, and safer trips allowing more track per square foot to be installed in less time.
payload.description: NYCT has in-house MOW Track Construction team capability that replaces outdated track with prefabricated 39-foot track panels. Many transit properties do not have this capability.

tool_args.label: Track panels reduce defects
tool_args.raw_text: For customers, this means fewer track defects that cause slow speed zones and other delays in some of our most challenging and problematic areas.

payload.claim_text: For customers, this means fewer track defects that cause slow speed zones and other delays in some of our most challenging and problematic areas.
payload.description: Track panel installation reduces track defects that cause slow speed zones and delays

tool_args.label: MOW safety record
tool_args.raw_text: Maintenance of Way (MOW) is a critical contributor to Subway's stellar safety record

payload.claim_text: Maintenance of Way (MOW) is a critical contributor to Subway's stellar safety record
payload.description: MOW contributes to subway's stellar safety record

tool_args.label: Gun Hill Road Dedicated Bus Lane
tool_args.raw_text: Gun Hill Road Dedicated Bus Lane project. NYC Department of Transportation advanced constructing dedicated bus lanes and pedestrian walkways for over 40,000 daily bus customers.

payload.description: Dedicated bus lanes and pedestrian walkways on Gun Hill Road. Constructed by NYC Department of Transportation in collaboration with NYCT. Serves over 40,000 daily bus customers. Addressed stakeholder needs including residents of Co-Op City, local businesses, and Montefiore hospital.
